name: 更衣室镜子
material: 玻璃镜面与旧金属边框
structure: 竖直长方形全身镜，靠近化妆台墙面，全程固定不移动，只产生稳定倒影，不制造额外人物
wear: 边框略有磨损的旧金色
shooting_angle: 后方靠墙视角，首帧画面左后方、中央后方或右后方，映出稳定倒影
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: realistic full-size scale, fixed position against wall
reference_context_policy: isolated product view in neutral background, no human figures or reflections of strangers
reference_prompt: A realistic full-body dressing room mirror, vertical rectangular shape approximately 160cm high and 60cm wide, silver-gray glass surface with a worn antique gold metal frame, placed against a wall near a vanity table, stable and fixed, no additional elements or moving parts, high detail on aged frame texture, neutral lighting to highlight reflection surface without distortions.。源记录硬约束：数量:1面；位置:首帧画面左后方靠墙，映出美咲稳定倒影；运动政策:固定不动，不制造额外人物

source_contract.position: 首帧画面左后方靠墙，映出美咲稳定倒影
